Girls PG near Osmanpura

Affordable Pricing & Plans

Jyoti Girls PG offers transparent tariffs so parents know exactly what their investment covers.

Simple, transparent pricing

Two plans — one for privacy, one for value

Twin sharing
₹5,000
per month

1 room · 2 beds · more privacy

  • More personal space
  • Only one roommate
  • Quieter environment
  • Airy rooms with large windows
  • All amenities included
Standard sharing
₹2,999
per month

2 rooms · 3–4 beds · best value

  • Great value for students
  • Lively, social environment
  • Full amenities included
  • Most popular choice
  • Ideal for junior college entrants

*Security deposit equals one month's rent and is fully refundable subject to property condition. Prices exclude meals.

What Every Plan Includes

  • High-speed Wi-Fi, power backup, and purified drinking water.
  • 24x7 caretaker supervision and CCTV monitoring.
  • Complimentary housekeeping and maintenance support.
  • Dedicated locker for valuables and personal storage.

Optional Add-Ons

Exam Bootcamps

Intensive weekend sessions with visiting faculty from Osmanpura institutes. ₹1,200 per camp.

Airport Pickup

Safe airport or railway transfers for outstation students. ₹1,500 per trip.

Parent Stay Suite

Furnished guest room for short parental visits, subject to availability. ₹800 per night.

Get a Personalised Quote

Share your daughter's course, preferred room type, and joining date to receive a customised payment plan with available offers.

Request pricing on WhatsApp
